description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the opensuse/tumbleweed Docker image and runs a before_script that installs make, tar, graphviz, liberation-fonts, texlive-xetex-bin, texlive-fontspec, texlive-dejavu, google-worksans-fonts, several TeX packages (beamer.cls, bbm.sty, capt-of.sty, textpos.sty, czech.ldf, pzdr.tfm, fancyvrb.sty) and pandoc via zypper. Define a single stage named build. Add a job called build-pdfs in the build stage that executes the command make -j$(nproc) and collects all generated PDF files matching */*.pdf as artifacts. The pipeline has no services, caches, or conditional rules.
